1M.digest: The defining theme of the past month for General Motors was a strategic pivot towards AI and data privacy amid ongoing industry pressures and regulatory challenges. The biggest catalyst emerged from the significant California privacy probe settlement, which included a substantial financial penalty and a 5-year ban on selling driver data, impacting GM [-2.33%]'s stock and highlighting the need for stringent compliance. Looking forward, GM is expected to leverage its strategic pivot to enhance its market position, although the company will continue to navigate the complexities of the electric vehicle market and evolving regulatory landscapes.
